'''Sermeria''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].

==History==
It was already a quiet [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] agriworld by [[1019 BBY]], when future [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Johun Othone]] was born in its [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Addolis]].

During the waning years of the Republic, it was represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] by [[Lanus Wrede]]. After [[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|Baktoid Armor Workshop]] and the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] shuttered factories which manufactured [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s on five worlds across the galaxy, Wrede made claims that the Techno Union had relocated their business to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Wrede noted that the Techno Union had continued to buy up raw materials, yet had not created any product during the same time period. He lacked any proof of this claim, and his statement was refuted by several business analysts. A three-month investigation turned up no evidence, and Wrede's political career and reputation were shattered. In the aftermatch, Wrede committed suicide. In reality, Wrede was correct in his suspicions, and these hidden battle droids would soon emerge from planets such as [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Ister Paddie/Legends|Ister Paddie]] succeeded Wrede in the Senate. When [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] closed its borders in opposition to the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]], Paddie decried their actions as selfish. He pointed out that his sector had less than a third of the resources of the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]], yet stayed loyal to the Republic.

Shortly after this, a suspicious package arrived at the [[Sermerian First House]] in Sermeria's capital. A cleaning [[Droid/Legends|droid]] discovered the package hidden behind a planter in the building's lobby, and when it was opened, it was discovered to contain an effigy of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] covered in [[Stone mite/Legends|stone mites]]. The package was addressed to both Senator Paddie and [[President/Legends|President]] [[Dibra Born]]. Though the government was shut down for several hours, bomb-squad droids and the [[Sermerian Bio-League]] managed to contain the threat.

When Palpatine formed the [[Loyalist Committee/Legends|Loyalist Committee]], Senator Paddie was made a member of the ten-being group, helping to represent the interests of the Expansion Region.
